state.title: Desktop/eye project/docker/docker-compose.yml

metadata.preview:
container_name: eye_disease_celery
    command: celery -A app.main worker --loglevel=info
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres123@postgres:5432/eyedisease
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379
      - CELERY_BROKER_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
      - CELERY_RESULT_BACKEND=redis://redis:6379/0
    volumes:
      - ./backend:/app
      - ./ml/models:/app/ml/models
      - uploads_data:/app/uploads
    depends_on:
      - postgres
      - redis
      - backend
    networks:
      - eye_disease_network
    restart: unless-stopped

  # Frontend
